title: dolichandrone atrovirens
intro: Dolichandrone atrovirens is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, commonly known as the brownback tree or forest flame tree. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dolichandrone atrovirens include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
